notes: Auto mode, split-screen hooks, image overlays with background removal, sectioned-clip hooks, sharper split detection, FLAC/OGG sound support.
_urls: Lemon Squeezy download links are signed/login-gated, so they can't feed the in-app updater (it only auto-downloads stable direct .exe/.dmg/.pkg URLs and errors on anything else). Empty url = updater stays silent (fail-soft). Customers always get the newest installers from app.lemonsqueezy.com/my-orders. Before shipping 2.9.8: host installers at a stable direct URL (e.g. a GitHub Release) and put those URLs here, or the in-app update banner can never work.
